_doc: FKTI Caretaker rotating checklist. Each beat picks the oldest DUE active watch, checks only that, updates its lastChecked. Dates are UTC YYYY-MM-DD. See caretaker/BEAT.md for the rules.

watches.instructions: Check for notable NEW sumo storylines for the CURRENT basho (injuries, withdrawals, big upsets, promotions, milestones) affecting wrestlers already present in data/rikishi_dossiers.json. For a factual storyline update, edit that wrestler's `gossip` array (keep 3-4 items; replace the stalest, don't just grow it). Touch at most ~3 wrestlers per beat. Anything that is an allegation/scandal/negative claim about a named person goes to caretaker/review-queue.md, NOT published. Cite sources.

DISCOVERY -> REVIEW ONLY. Never publish to the dining app (it is deploy-by-hand and CELIAC SAFETY is rule #1). Pick ONE trip city (kyoto, nara, nagoya, kanazawa, hiroshima, nagano, toba — see https://fkti-dining-app.pages.dev/data/manifest.json). Fetch that city's existing places from https://fkti-dining-app.pages.dev/data/<city>.json so you don't duplicate. Web-search for newly-opened or well-reviewed VEGAN / vegetarian-friendly spots there that are NOT already listed and that you can verify exist and are open. For each, APPEND a candidate to caretaker/dining-candidates.md in the dining place schema {id,name,category,lat,lng, gf_confidence:'ask', gf_label, gf_detail, vegan_status, vegan_label, vegan_detail, hours_raw, source}. SAFETY: never assert a place is 'safe' — default confidence to 'ask' unless a source explicitly confirms; give honest reality; always include a source URL. Do NOT touch the dining app's live data. Greg vets candidates and adds the good ones himself.
NEEDS the travel app repo (not yet wired). When enabled: verify the itinerary's external links (Google Doc, booking/venue pages) still resolve; flag any dead links to caretaker/review-queue.md.
NEEDS the travel itinerary (not yet wired). When enabled: check for events, closures, weather notes, or seasonal happenings near TODAY's itinerary stop that are worth surfacing to the group.
